title: <div>For those who don’t know my work, I am appropriating the bones of narrative
content:
For those who don’t know my work, I am appropriating the bones of narratives from ancient Greek/Roman mythology, Ovid’s Metamorphoses in particular, and throwing some new flesh on them. The Metamorphoses, and all other mythological/religious texts, open with a creation narrative—so, this is my attempt at something of a creation myth. I’ve chosen the email format for this poem. Jupiter sends out an email blast to all the gods (in my narrative they’re called mods [short for moderators]) in order to corral them under the roof of one new narrative they’re going to all get behind in order to silence the questions of the masses and ease their poor troubled minds post ‘flood.’

Dear [FIRSTNAME],

as the story goes: the world was lathered rinséd repeated, thrice in fact now (maybe more, fuck knows at this point, lost count how many times we wiped em out lol (lets leave that bit out, maybe?)). floods drowning etc. pulled the old plug, as they say. and allow me to say: i am relieved!!!! for a minute there I thought we were goners! phew! anyway, to begin again, to start fresh with the proper protocol in order, the proper failsafes: an adam and eve sort of deal, different names though, let not make thou too obvious eh. leave out the apple the rib the talking snake. we nobled appointed moderators need to all come to an agreeable aggreance, a narrative to pass from fingers to eyes to mouth to ears to memory to fact. a narrative indeed, a narrative is what we need. (do we do the evolution thing?) monkey—————————>man—>machine=progression we profess to the deemed. come together we must and in will thrust ultimate worth of power in bytes and bits. no particulars necessary. what comes next? grace, a break frm cold white loneliness, from peaks and valleys. from the unknown. salvation. peace! thts our sell line, and sell it naught. they just gotta swallow, not purchase.
